title: US to exit Nato? Trump slams alliance as 'paper tiger' as bloc dithers on joining Iran war
summary_full: President Trump is strongly considering withdrawing the US from Nato, labeling the alliance a 'paper tiger' due to European allies' refusal to support US actions in the Iran conflict. He cited a lack of reciprocity and criticized the UK's stance. The US may re-examine its Nato role, with potential structural changes like a 'pay-to-play' model being discussed.
